label: Financial Instruments, Owned, State and Municipal Government Obligations, at Fair Value
description: The fair value as of the balance sheet date of firm holdings in fixed income obligations issued by state and local governments and authorities. Includes both pledged (to counterparties as collateral for financing transactions) and unpledged holdings.

label: Financial Instruments, Owned, US Government and Agency Obligations, at Fair Value
description: The fair value as of the balance sheet date of firm holdings in debt obligations issued by the US government including short-term Treasury bills, medium-term Treasury notes, and long-term Treasury bonds, as well as debt issued by agencies. Includes both pledged (to counterparties as collateral for financing transactions) and unpledged holdings.

label: Financial Instruments Sold, Not yet Purchased, at Fair Value
description: Fair value of obligations incurred from short sales.

label: Financial Instruments Subject to Mandatory Redemption, Past Contractual Redemption Date, Due to Outstanding Activity
description: Amount of mandatorily redeemable capital stock past the contractual redemption date due to outstanding activity.

label: Financial Instrument Subject to Mandatory Redemption, Maturity, Year Five
description: Amount of mandatorily redeemable capital stock maturing in fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

label: Financial Instrument Subject to Mandatory Redemption, Maturity, Year Four
description: Amount of mandatorily redeemable capital stock maturing in fourth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

label: Financial Instrument Subject to Mandatory Redemption, Maturity, Year Three
description: Amount of mandatorily redeemable capital stock maturing in third fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

label: Financial Instrument Subject to Mandatory Redemption, Maturity, Year Two
description: Amount of mandatorily redeemable capital stock maturing in second fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

label: Financial Instrument Subject to Mandatory Redemption, Maturity, Year One
description: Amount of mandatorily redeemable capital stock maturing in next fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

label: Financial Instruments Subject to Mandatory Redemption, Settlement Terms, Impact of Changes in Fair Value of Shares on Number of Shares
description: Increase (decrease) in number of shares from change in fair value of issuer's equity shares affect on settlement amount. For example, but not limited to, additional shares for each $1 decrease in the fair value of one share.

label: Financial Liabilities Fair Value Disclosure
description: Fair value of financial obligations, including, but not limited to, debt instruments, derivative liabilities, federal funds purchased and sold under agreements to repurchase, securities loaned or sold under agreements to repurchase, financial instruments sold not yet purchased, guarantees, line of credit, loans and notes payable, servicing liability, and trading liabilities.

label: Financial Services Costs (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
description: The aggregate costs incurred during the reporting period related to financial services rendered by an entity.

label: Financial Services Liabilities
description: For entities that provide full or partial financing and servicing for customers supplementary to its major operations (such as a manufacturer or a homebuilder providing and servicing loans to buyers), represents the liabilities associated with such activities, including accounts payable and accrued liabilities.

label: Financial Services Revenue (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
description: The aggregate financial services revenue and operating interest income earned during the reporting period.

label: Financing Interest Expense
description: This element represents interest incurred for borrowed money which was used to produce goods or render services.

label: Financing Receivable (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The amount of the recorded investment in a contractual right to receive money on demand or on fixed or determinable dates that is recognized as an asset in the creditor's statement of financial position. Examples include, but are not limited to, accounts receivable (with terms exceeding one year), notes receivable and receivables relating to lessor's rights to payments from leases other than operating leases that have been recorded as assets.

label: Financing Receivable, Accrued Interest, after Allowance for Credit Loss
description: Amount, after allowance for credit loss, of accrued interest on financing receivable.

label: Financing Receivable, Accrued Interest, before Allowance for Credit Loss
description: Amount, before allowance for credit loss, of accrued interest on financing receivable.

label: Financing Receivable, Accrued Interest, Writeoff
description: Amount of writeoff of accrued interest on financing receivable recognized by reversing interest income.

label: Financing Receivable, after Deferred Income Offset (Deprecated 2020-01-31)
description: Amount, after fee received for commitment to originate or purchase, of financing receivable. Excludes financing receivable covered under loss sharing agreement.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Loss, Foreign Currency Translation
description: Amount of foreign currency translation gain (loss) which (increases) decreases allowance for credit loss on financing receivable.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Loss, Purchased with Credit Deterioration, Increase
description: Amount of increase in allowance for credit loss on financing receivable purchased with credit deterioration.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Loss, Writeoff, after Recovery
description: Amount, after recovery, of writeoff of financing receivable, charged against allowance for credit loss.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Loss
description: Amount of allowance for credit loss on financing receivable. Excludes allowance for financing receivable covered under loss sharing agreement.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Losses, Collectively Evaluated for Impairment
description: The valuation allowance for financing receivables that are expected to be uncollectible that were collectively evaluated for impairment.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Losses, Effect of Change in Method
description: The effect of a change in method or methods for calculating the allowance for credit losses on the current period provision.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Losses, Individually Evaluated for Impairment (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The valuation allowance for financing receivables that are expected to be uncollectible that were individually evaluated for impairment.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Losses, Individually Evaluated for Impairment
description: Amount of valuation allowance for financing receivables that are expected to be uncollectible that were individually evaluated for impairment.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Loss, Period Increase (Decrease)
description: Amount of increase (decrease) in allowance for credit loss on financing receivable.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Losses, Provisions (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: Charge to expense for financing receivables that are expected to be uncollectible.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Losses, Recoveries (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: Reduction to the allowance for credit losses related to collections on financing receivables which have been partially or fully charged off as bad debts.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Loss, Recovery
description: Amount of increase in allowance for credit loss on financing receivable from recovery.

label: Financing Receivable, Allowance for Credit Loss, Writeoff
description: Amount of writeoff of financing receivable, charged against allowance for credit loss.

label: Financing Receivable, before Allowance for Credit Loss and Fee
description: Amount, before allowance for credit loss and fee, of financing receivable. Excludes financing receivable covered under loss sharing agreement.

label: Financing Receivable, Change in Method, Credit Loss Expense (Reversal)
description: Amount of credit loss expense (reversal of expense) for financing receivable from change in methodology.

label: Financing Receivable, Change in Present Value, Expense (Reversal)
description: Amount of expense (reversal of expense) for expected credit loss on financing receivable, from change in present value of expected cash flows.

label: Financing Receivable, Change in Present Value, Interest Income
description: Amount of interest income on financing receivable, from change in present value of expected cash flows, attributable to passage of time.

label: Financing Receivable, Collectively Evaluated for Impairment
description: The balance of financing receivables that were collectively evaluated for impairment.

label: Financing Receivable, Covered, after Allowance for Credit Loss
description: Amount, after allowance, of finance receivable covered by loss sharing agreement.

label: Financing Receivable, Covered, Allowance for Credit Loss
description: Amount of allowance for finance receivable covered by loss sharing agreement.

label: Financing Receivable, Deferred Commitment Fee
description: Amount of fee received for commitment to originate or purchase financing receivable where likelihood of commitment being exercised is remote. Excludes financing receivable covered under loss sharing agreement.

label: Financing Receivable, Individually Evaluated for Impairment
description: The balance of financing receivables that were individually evaluated for impairment.

label: Financing Receivable, Loan in Process
description: Amount of undisbursed portion of financing receivable balance. Excludes financing receivable covered under loss sharing agreement.

label: Financing Receivable, Modifications, Number of Contracts (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The number of financing receivables that have been modified by troubled debt restructurings.

label: Financing Receivable, Modifications, Number of Contracts (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
description: Number of financing receivables that have been modified by troubled debt restructurings.

label: Financing Receivable, Modifications, Number of Contracts
description: Number of financing receivables that have been modified by troubled debt restructurings.

label: Financing Receivable, Modifications, Post-Modification Recorded Investment (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The amount of the outstanding recorded investment related to financing receivables that have been modified by troubled debt restructurings after the financing receivable has been modified.

label: Financing Receivable, Modifications, Post-Modification Recorded Investment (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
description: Amount of investment in financing receivables (after modification) modified by troubled debt restructurings.

label: Financing Receivable, Troubled Debt Restructuring, Postmodification
description: Amount, after troubled debt restructuring, of modified financing receivable.

label: Financing Receivable, Modifications, Pre-Modification Recorded Investment (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The amount of the outstanding recorded investment related to financing receivables that have been modified by troubled debt restructurings before the financing receivable has been modified.

label: Financing Receivable, Modifications, Pre-Modification Recorded Investment (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
description: Amount of investment in financing receivables (before modification) modified by troubled debt restructurings.

label: Financing Receivable, Troubled Debt Restructuring, Premodification
description: Amount, before troubled debt restructuring, of financing receivable to be modified.

label: Financing Receivable, Troubled Debt Restructuring
description: Amount of financing receivable modified as troubled debt restructuring.

label: Financing Receivable, Troubled Debt Restructuring, Subsequent Default, Number of Contracts
description: Number of financing receivable contracts modified as troubled debt restructuring within previous 12 months, with subsequent payment default.

label: Financing Receivable, Troubled Debt Restructuring, Subsequent Default
description: Amount of financing receivable modified as troubled debt restructuring within previous 12 months, with subsequent payment default.

label: Financing Receivable, Nonaccrual, Interest Income
description: Amount of interest income on financing receivable on nonaccrual status.

label: Financing Receivable, Nonaccrual, No Allowance
description: Amount of financing receivable on nonaccrual status with no allowance for credit loss.

label: Financing Receivable, Nonaccrual, Percent Past Due
description: Percentage of nonaccrual financing receivable balance outstanding that is past due.

label: Financing Receivable, Originated, More than Five Years before Current Fiscal Year
description: Amount of financing receivable originated more than five years prior to current fiscal year.

label: Financing Receivable, Year Five, Originated, Four Years before Current Fiscal Year
description: Amount of financing receivable originated four years prior to current fiscal year.

label: Financing Receivable, Year One, Originated, Current Fiscal Year
description: Amount of financing receivable originated in current fiscal year.

label: Financing Receivable, Year Two, Originated, Fiscal Year before Current Fiscal Year
description: Amount of financing receivable originated in fiscal year prior to current fiscal year.

label: Financing Receivable, Year Four, Originated, Three Years before Current Fiscal Year
description: Amount of financing receivable originated three years prior to current fiscal year.

label: Financing Receivable, Year Three, Originated, Two Years before Current Fiscal Year
description: Amount of financing receivable originated two years prior to current fiscal year.

label: Financing Receivable, Percent Past Due (Deprecated 2017-01-31)
description: Percent of financing receivables past due.

label: Financing Receivable, Percent Past Due
description: Percentage of financing receivable balance that is past due.

label: Financing Receivable, Purchased with Credit Deterioration, Allowance for Credit Loss at Acquisition Date
description: Amount of allowance for credit loss at acquisition date of financing receivable purchased with credit deterioration.

label: Financing Receivable, Purchased with Credit Deterioration, Amount at Par Value
description: Amount at par value of financing receivable purchased with credit deterioration.

label: Financing Receivable, Purchased with Credit Deterioration, Amount at Purchase Price
description: Amount at purchase price of financing receivable purchased with credit deterioration.

label: Financing Receivable, Purchased with Credit Deterioration, Discount (Premium)
description: Amount of discount (premium) attributable to other factors on financing receivable purchased with credit deterioration.

label: Financing Receivable, Reclassification to Held-for-sale
description: Amount of financing receivable reclassified to held-for-sale.

label: Financing Receivable, Recorded Investment, 1 to 29 Days Past Due (Deprecated 2015-01-31)
description: Financing receivables that are less than 30 days past due.

label: Financing Receivable, Recorded Investment, 30 to 59 Days Past Due (Deprecated 2015-01-31)
description: Financing receivables that are less than 60 days past due but more than 29 days past due.

label: Financing Receivable, Recorded Investment, 60 to 89 Days Past Due (Deprecated 2015-01-31)
description: Financing receivables that are less than 90 days past due but more than 59 days past due.

label: Financing Receivable, 90 Days or More Past Due, Still Accruing
description: Amount of financing receivable 90 days or more past due and still accruing.

label: Financing Receivable, Not Past Due
description: Amount of financing receivable not past due.

label: Financing Receivable, Recorded Investment, Equal to Greater than 90 Days Past Due (Deprecated 2015-01-31)
description: Financing receivables that are equal to or greater than 90 days past due.

label: Financing Receivable, Nonaccrual
description: Amount of financing receivable on nonaccrual status.

label: Financing Receivable, Past Due
description: Amount of financing receivable past due.

label: Financing Receivable, Revolving
description: Amount of financing receivable that can be withdrawn, repaid and redrawn.

label: Financing Receivable, Revolving, Converted to Term Loan
description: Amount of revolving financing receivable converted to term loan.

label: Financing Receivable, Revolving, Converted to Term Loan During Period
description: Amount of increase in term loan from conversion of revolving financing receivable.

label: Financing Receivable, Purchase
description: Amount of increase from purchase of financing receivable.

label: Financing Receivable, Sale
description: Amount of decrease from sale and reclassification to held-for-sale of financing receivable.

label: Financing Receivable, Transfer to Held-for-Investment, Allowance for Credit Loss, Expense
description: Amount of expense for allowance for credit loss on financing receivable transferred to held-for-investment classification.

label: Financing Receivable, Transfer to Held-for-Sale, Allowance for Credit Loss, Expense Reversal
description: Amount of expense reversal of allowance for credit loss on financing receivable transferred to held-for-sale classification.

label: Financing Receivable, Unamortized Loan Fee (Cost) and Purchase Premium (Discount)
description: Amount of unamortized loan commitment, origination, and other fees (costs) and purchase premium (discount) on financing receivable. Excludes financing receivable covered under loss sharing agreement.

label: Financing Receivable, Unamortized Loan Fee (Cost)
description: Amount of unamortized loan commitment, origination, and other fees (costs) on financing receivable. Excludes financing receivable covered under loss sharing agreement.

label: Financing Receivable, Unamortized Purchase Premium (Discount)
description: Amount of unamortized purchase premium (discount) on financing receivable. Excludes financing receivable covered under loss sharing agreement.

label: Financing Receivables, Impaired, Troubled Debt Restructuring, Write-down
description: Reflects the amount of the write-down related to a troubled debt restructuring.

label: Finite-Lived Computer Software, Gross (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date of capitalized costs to ready software for sale or licensing, or for long-term internal use.

label: Finite-Lived Contractual Rights, Gross
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date of an intangible asset that arises from a contractual arrangement with a third party (not including franchise rights and license agreements).

label: Finite-Lived Core Deposits, Gross
description: Bank deposits belonging to an acquired bank that can be counted on as a stable source of lending funds. These deposits have the following attributes: predictable costs and low sensitivity to interest rates. This intangible asset is usually amortized over its estimated useful life.

label: Finite-Lived Customer Lists, Gross
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date of an asset comprised of customer information, acquired in a business combination or other transaction, having a finite beneficial life.

label: Finite-Lived Customer Relationships, Gross
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date to an asset acquired in a business combination representing a favorable existing relationship with customers having a finite beneficial life.

label: Finite-Lived Franchise Rights, Gross (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date of acquired rights to market the name or products of another entity in a specified territory and for a specified period, including reasonably expected renewal periods.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Acquired-in-Place Leases
description: This element represents the amount of value allocated by a lessor (acquirer) to lease agreements which exist at acquisition of a leased property. Such amount may include the value assigned to existing tenant relationships and excludes the market adjustment component of the value assigned for above or below-market leases acquired.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Off-market Lease, Favorable, Gross
description: This element represents the identifiable intangible asset established upon acquisition based on a favorable difference between the terms of an acquired lease and the current market terms for that lease at the acquisition date.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Accumulated Amortization
description: Accumulated amount of amortization of assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life.

label: Finite-lived Intangible Assets Acquired (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
description: Amount of assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life acquired.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Amortization Expense (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: Aggregate amount of intangible asset amortization recognized as expense during the period.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, after Year Five
description: Amount of amortization for asset, excluding financial asset and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized after fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Amortization Expense, Next Rolling Twelve Months
description: Amount of amortization expense for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life expected to be recognized in the next rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year One
description: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in next fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Remainder of Fiscal Year
description: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in remainder of current fiscal year.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Amortization Expense, Rolling after Year Five
description: Amount of amortization expense for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life expected to be recognized after the fifth rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Amortization Expense, Rolling Year Five
description: Amount of amortization expense for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life expected to be recognized in the fifth rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Amortization Expense, Rolling Year Four
description: Amount of amortization expense for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life expected to be recognized in the fourth rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Amortization Expense, Rolling Year Three
description: Amount of amortization expense for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life expected to be recognized in the third rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Amortization Expense, Rolling Year Two
description: Amount of amortization expense for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life expected to be recognized in the second rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Five
description: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in fifth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Four
description: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in fourth fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Three
description: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in third fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Asset, Expected Amortization, Year Two
description: Amount of amortization for assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with finite life expected to be recognized in second fiscal year following current fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported from current statement of financial position date (rolling approach).

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Average Useful Life (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The average useful life of a major finite-lived intangible asset class. A major class is composed of intangible assets that can be grouped together because they are similar either by their nature or by their use in the operations of a company.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Cost Incurred to Renew or Extend
description: The amount of capitalized costs incurred in the period to renew or extend the term of a recognized finite-lived (amortizing and amortizable) intangible asset.

label: Finite-lived Intangible Assets, Fair Value Disclosure
description: Fair value portion of assets, excluding financial assets, that lack physical substance, having a limited useful life.

label: Finite Lived Intangible Assets, Foreign Currency Translation Gain (Loss)
description: Amount of foreign currency translation gain (loss) which increases (decreases) assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Future Amortization Expense (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The aggregate estimated amortization expense for succeeding fiscal years for intangible assets subject to amortization.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Gross
description: Amount before amortization of assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Net
description: Amount after amortization of assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Period Increase (Decrease)
description: Amount of increase (decrease) in carrying value of assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Purchase Accounting Adjustments
description: Amount of increase (decrease) to assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life for purchase accounting adjustments.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Translation Adjustments (Deprecated 2016-01-31)
description: Amount of increase (decrease) to assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life for foreign currency translation adjustments.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Translation and Purchase Accounting Adjustments
description: Amount of increase (decrease) to assets, excluding financial assets and goodwill, lacking physical substance with a finite life for foreign currency translation adjustments and purchase accounting adjustments.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Useful Life (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The useful life of all finite-lived intangible assets.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Useful Life, Maximum (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The maximum useful life of a major finite-lived intangible asset class. A major class is composed of intangible assets that can be grouped together because they are similar either by their nature or by their use in the operations of a company.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Useful Life, Minimum (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The minimum useful life of a major finite-lived intangible asset class. A major class is composed of intangible assets that can be grouped together because they are similar either by their nature or by their use in the operations of a company.

label: Finite-Lived Intangible Assets, Weighted-Average Useful Life (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The calculated weighted-average useful life of all finite-lived intangible assets.

label: Finite-Lived License Agreements, Gross
description: Gross carrying amount as of the balance sheet date of certain rights acquired to exercise a certain privilege or pursue a particular business or occupation and which is deemed to have a finite economic life.

label: Finite-Lived Media Content, Gross (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date of capitalized costs for media content having a finite economic life.

label: Finite-Lived Noncompete Agreements, Gross
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date of payments made to third parties in exchange for their agreement not to engage in specified competitive practices in specified geographic territories for a specified period of time.

label: Finite-Lived Patents, Gross
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date of the costs pertaining to the exclusive legal rights granted to the owner of the patent to exploit an invention or a process for a period of time specified by law. Such costs may have been expended to directly apply and receive patent rights, or to acquire such rights.

label: Finite-Lived Royalty, Gross (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date of an acquired contractual arrangement associated with the payment of royalties covering a specified period of time.

label: Finite-Lived Trade Names, Gross
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date of the rights acquired through registration of a trade name to gain or protect exclusive use thereof for a reasonably expected period of economic benefit.

label: Finite-Lived Trade Secrets, Gross (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date of trade secrets which protect the entity's unique technology and knowledge in its field of business so as to obtain competitive advantage for a reasonably expected period of economic benefit.

label: Finite-Lived Trademarks, Gross
description: Gross carrying amount before accumulated amortization as of the balance sheet date for the rights acquired through registration of a trademark to gain or protect exclusive use of a business name, symbol or other device or style for a specified period of time.

label: Finite-lived Intangible Assets Acquired
description: Amount of increase in assets, excluding financial assets, lacking physical substance with a definite life, from an acquisition.

label: Long-term Debt of Registrant, Maturities, Repayments of Principal in Year Three (Deprecated 2014-01-31)
description: Amount of long-term debt of the registrant maturing in the third fiscal year following the latest fiscal year.

label: Long-term Debt of Registrant, Maturities, Repayments of Principal after Year Five (Deprecated 2014-01-31)
description: Amount of long-term debt of the registrant maturing after the fifth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year.

label: Long-term Debt of Registrant, Maturities, Repayments of Principal in Year Five (Deprecated 2014-01-31)
description: Amount of long-term debt of the registrant maturing in the fifth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year.

label: Long-term Debt of Registrant, Maturities, Repayments of Principal in Year Four (Deprecated 2014-01-31)
description: Amount of long-term debt of the registrant maturing in the fourth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year.

label: Long-term Debt of Registrant, Maturities, Repayments of Principal in Year Two (Deprecated 2014-01-31)
description: Amount of long-term debt of the registrant maturing in the second fiscal year following the latest fiscal year.

label: Long-term Debt of Registrant, Maturities, Repayments of Principal in Next Twelve Months (Deprecated 2014-01-31)
description: Amount of long-term debt of the registrant maturing in the next fiscal year following the latest fiscal year.

label: Fixtures and Equipment, Gross
description: Amount before accumulated depreciation of fixtures and equipment. Includes, but is not limited to, machinery, equipment, and engines.

label: Flight Equipment, Accumulated Depreciation
description: The cumulative amount of depreciation (related to long-lived flight assets used in the entity's principle business operations, including owned aircraft and on capital lease, as well as capitalized improvements) that has been recognized in the income statement.

label: Flight Equipment, Gross
description: The gross amount of long-lived, depreciable flight assets used in the entity's principle business operations, including owned aircraft and on capital lease, as well as capitalized improvements.

label: Flight Equipment, Net
description: The net amount of long-lived, depreciable flight assets used in the entity's principle business operations, including owned aircraft and on capital lease, as well as capitalized improvements.

label: Flight Equipment Owned, Accumulated Depreciation (Deprecated 2016-01-31)
description: The cumulative amount of depreciation (related to long-lived flight assets owned by the entity and used in the entity's principle business operations, including owned aircraft, as well as capitalized improvements) that has been recognized in the income statement.

label: Flight Equipment Owned, Gross (Deprecated 2016-01-31)
description: The gross amount of long-lived, depreciable flight assets owned by the entity and used in the entity's principle business operations, including owned aircraft as well as capitalized improvements.

label: Flight Equipment Owned, Net (Deprecated 2016-01-31)
description: The net amount of long-lived, depreciable flight assets owned by the entity and used in the entity's principle business operations, including owned aircraft as well as capitalized improvements.

label: Floor Brokerage
description: Broker-dealers often use other brokers to execute trades on their behalf. The trading broker-dealer becomes a customer of the executing broker-dealer and pays a floor brokerage fee. Such fees are paid periodically either directly to the executing broker-dealer or through a clearing house.

label: Floor Brokerage, Exchange and Clearance Fees
description: The amount of expense during the period for floor brokerage fees paid to other broker-dealers to execute trades on their behalf, stock exchange fees, order flow fees, and clearance fees.

label: Food and Beverage, Cost of Sales (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
description: The cost related to generating revenue from the sale of food (prepared and cooked-to-order foodstuffs, as well as snack items) and beverages (bottled or on-tap alcoholic beverages, as well as nonalcoholic beverages like carbonated drinks, juices, energy/sports drinks, water, coffee, and tea).

label: Food and Beverage Revenue (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
description: Revenue from sale of food (prepared and cooked-to-order foodstuffs, as well as snack items) and beverages (bottled or on-tap alcoholic beverages, as well as nonalcoholic beverages like carbonated drinks, juices, energy/sports drinks, water, coffee, and tea).

label: Repossessed Assets
description: Carrying amount as of the balance sheet date of all assets obtained in full or partial satisfaction of a debt arrangement through foreclosure proceedings or defeasance; includes real and personal property; equity interests in corporations, partnerships, and joint ventures; and beneficial interests in trusts.

label: Foreclosed Real Estate Expense
description: Amount of expense recognized during the period for the foreclosure on real estate assets.

label: Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Asset at Fair Value
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of all foreign currency derivative assets designated as cash flow hedging instruments.

label: Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Derivative at Fair Value, Net
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of all foreign currency derivatives designated as cash flow hedging instruments.

label: Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Gain (Loss) Reclassified to Earnings, Net
description: The amount of net gains or losses on foreign currency cash flow hedges reclassified during the period to earnings from accumulated other comprehensive income upon the hedged transaction affecting earnings.

label: Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Gain (Loss) to be Reclassified During Next 12 Months
description: The estimated net amount of unrealized gains or losses on foreign currency cash flow hedges at the reporting date expected to be reclassified to earnings within the next 12 months.

label: Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Liability at Fair Value
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of all foreign currency derivative liabilities designated as cash flow hedging instruments.

label: Foreign Currency Contract, Asset, Fair Value Disclosure
description: Fair value portion of asset contracts related to the exchange of different currencies, including, but not limited to, foreign currency options, forward contracts, and swaps.

label: Foreign Currency Contracts, Liability, Fair Value Disclosure
description: Fair value portion of liability contracts related to the exchange of different currencies, including, but not limited to, foreign currency options, forward (delivery or nondelivery) contracts, and swaps entered into.

label: Foreign Currency Derivative Assets at Fair Value (Deprecated 2014-01-31)
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of foreign currency derivative assets, which includes all such derivative instruments in hedging and nonhedging relationships that are recognized as assets on the balance sheet.

label: Foreign Currency Derivative Instruments Not Designated as Hedging Instruments, Asset at Fair Value
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of all foreign currency derivative assets not designated as hedging instruments.

label: Foreign Currency Derivative Instruments Not Designated as Hedging Instruments at Fair Value, Net
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of all foreign currency derivatives not designated as hedging instruments.

label: Foreign Currency Derivative Instruments Not Designated as Hedging Instruments, Liability at Fair Value
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of all foreign currency derivative liabilities not designated as hedging instruments.

label: Foreign Currency Derivative Liabilities at Fair Value (Deprecated 2014-01-31)
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of interest rate derivative liabilities, which includes all such derivative instruments in hedging and nonhedging relationships that are recognized as liabilities on the balance sheet.

label: Foreign Currency Derivatives at Fair Value, Net (Deprecated 2014-01-31)
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of foreign currency derivative assets, net of foreign currency derivative liabilities, which includes all such derivative instruments in hedging and nonhedging relationships that are recognized on the balance sheet.

label: Foreign Currency Exchange Rate, Remeasurement (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The foreign exchange rate used to remeasure amounts denominated in a currency other than the functional currency into the functional currency.

label: Foreign Currency Exchange Rate, Remeasurement
description: Foreign exchange rate used to remeasure amounts denominated in a currency other than functional currency into functional currency.

label: Foreign Currency Exchange Rate, Translation (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The foreign exchange rate used to translate amounts denominated in the functional currency to the reporting currency.

label: Foreign Currency Exchange Rate, Translation
description: Foreign exchange rate used to translate amounts denominated in functional currency to reporting currency.

label: Foreign Currency Fair Value Hedge Asset at Fair Value
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of all derivative assets designated as foreign currency fair value hedging instruments.

label: Foreign Currency Fair Value Hedge Derivative at Fair Value, Net
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of all derivatives designated as foreign currency fair value hedging instruments.

label: Foreign Currency Fair Value Hedge Liability at Fair Value
description: Fair value as of the balance sheet date of all derivative liabilities designated as foreign currency fair value hedging instruments.

label: Foreign Currency Transaction Gain, before Tax
description: Amount before tax of foreign currency transaction realized and unrealized gain recognized in the income statement.

label: Foreign Currency Transaction Gain (Loss), before Tax
description: Amount before tax of foreign currency transaction realized and unrealized gain (loss) recognized in the income statement.

label: Foreign Currency Transaction Gain (Loss), Realized
description: Amount before tax of foreign currency transaction realized gain (loss) recognized in the income statement.

label: Foreign Currency Transaction Gain (Loss), Unrealized
description: Amount before tax of foreign currency transaction unrealized gain (loss) recognized in the income statement.

label: Foreign Currency Transaction Loss, before Tax
description: Amount before tax of foreign currency transaction realized and unrealized loss recognized in the income statement.

label: Foreign Earnings Repatriated
description: Amount of foreign earnings repatriated from subsidiaries outside the country of domicile.

label: Foreign Earnings Repatriated under American Jobs Creation Act of 2004, Repatriated Earnings (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
description: The amount of foreign earnings repatriated under the special one-time dividends received deduction provided to a US taxpayer by the American Jobs Creation Act of 2004.

label: Foreign Financial Institutions, Actual Deposits
description: The amount of deposits held by branches of foreign institutions.

label: Foreign Income Tax Expense (Benefit), Continuing Operations
description: Amount of current and deferred foreign income tax expense (benefit) attributable to income (loss) from continuing operations.

label: Former Gain Contingency, Recognized in Current Period
description: Amount of gain recognized in the period that had been disclosed in prior periods as a contingent gain.

label: Forward Contract Indexed to Issuer's Equity, Forward Rate Per Share
description: The per share price of the Company's stock at which the contract holder of the freestanding contract has the right to purchase or sell the Company's stock at a future date.

label: Forward Contract Indexed to Issuer's Equity, Indexed Shares
description: The number of issuer's shares to which the forward contract is indexed.

label: Forward Contract Indexed to Issuer's Equity, Settlement Alternatives, Cash, at Fair Value
description: Current fair value of each cash settlement alternative for each freestanding forward contract.

label: Forward Contract Indexed to Issuer's Equity, Settlement Alternatives, Shares, at Fair Value
description: Number of shares as a settlement alternative for each freestanding forward contract.

label: Forward Contract Indexed to Issuer's Equity, Shares
description: The maximum number of shares that could be issued to net share settle a contract, if applicable. If a contract does not have a fixed or determinable maximum number of shares that may be required to be issued, disclose the fact that a potentially infinite number of shares could be issued to settle the contract.

label: Franchise Costs (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
description: Costs incurred and are directly related to generating franchise revenues.

label: Franchise Revenue (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
description: Revenue earned during the period from consideration (often a percentage of the franchisee's sales) received for the right to operate a business using the entity's name, merchandise, services, methodologies, promotional support, marketing, and supplies.

label: Franchisor Costs
description: Aggregate costs incurred that are directly related to activities, including but not limited to, generating franchise revenues from franchisor owned outlets and franchised outlets.

label: Franchisor Revenue (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
description: Amount of revenue earned from franchisor owned outlets and franchised outlets.

label: Freight Costs (Deprecated 2018-01-31)
description: Cost of freight-in, whether based on weight, negotiated freight rates and method of transportation (that is, rail, barge, truck, and so forth).

label: Frequent Flier Liability, Current
description: Value of revenue deferred or cost to provide future products or services, primarily air transportation, associated with programs used by airlines to encourage passenger loyalty by providing rewards geared to the frequency of travel on the sponsoring airline, typically in the form of frequent flyer miles, points, or segments that can be accumulated and converted into free or discounted travel or other redemption options. Used to reflect the current portion of the liability (within one year or within the normal operating cycle if longer).

label: Frequent Flier Liability, Noncurrent
description: Value of revenue deferred or cost to provide future products or services, primarily air transportation, associated with programs used by airlines to encourage passenger loyalty by providing rewards geared to the frequency of travel on the sponsoring airline, typically in the form of frequent flyer miles, points, or segments that can be accumulated and converted into free or discounted travel or other redemption options. Used to reflect the noncurrent portion of the liability.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Accounts Payable
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to accounts payable.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Accrued Liabilities
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to accrued liabilities.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Accumulated Depreciation and Amortization
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to accumulated depreciation and amortization.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Accumulated Other Comprehensive Income (Loss)
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to accumulated other comprehensive Income or Loss.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Additional Paid-in Capital
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to additional paid-in capital.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Amortizable Intangible Assets
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to amortizable intangible assets.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Assets
description: Total fresh-start adjustment to assets.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Cash and Cash Equivalents
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to cash and cash equivalents.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Common Stock
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to common stock.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Current Assets
description: Total fresh-start adjustment to current assets.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Current Liabilities
description: Total fresh-start adjustment to current liabilities.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Current Maturities of Long-term Debt
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to current maturities of long-term debt.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Debtor-in-Possession Financing
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to debtor-in-possession financing.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Debt Issuance Costs
description: Amount of increase (decrease) in debt issuance costs from fresh-start adjustment.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Deferred Income Tax Assets, Current
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to current deferred income tax assets.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Deferred Income Tax Assets, Noncurrent
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to noncurrent deferred income tax assets.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Deferred Income Tax Liabilities, Current
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to deferred income tax liabilities.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Deferred Income Tax Liabilities, Noncurrent
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to noncurrent deferred income tax liabilities.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Goodwill
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to goodwill.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Inventories
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to inventories.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Investments
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to investments.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Liabilities
description: Total fresh-start adjustment to liabilities.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Liabilities and Stockholders' Equity
description: Total fresh-start adjustment to liabilities and stockholders' equity.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Liabilities Subject to Compromise
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to liabilities subject to compromise.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Long-term Debt
description: Total fresh-start adjustment to long-term debt.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Nonamortizable Intangible Assets
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to nonamortizable intangible assets.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Noncurrent Other Obligations
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to noncurrent obligations classified as other.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Other Assets
description: Total fresh-start adjustment to other assets.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Other Assets, Noncurrent
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to total other noncurrent assets.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Other Current Liabilities
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to other current liabilities.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Other Long-term Debt
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to other long-term debt.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Other Noncurrent Obligations
description: The total of the amount of fresh-start adjustments to other noncurrent obligations.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Other Postretirement Obligations
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to other postretirement obligations.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Other Property and Equipment
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to other property and equipment.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Pension Obligations
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to pension obligations.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Postconfirmation Credit Facility
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to postconfirmation credit facility.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Preferred and Common Stock Held in Treasury
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to preferred and common stock held in treasury.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Preferred Stock
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to preferred stock.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Prepaid and Other Current Assets
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to prepaid and other current assets.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Property and Equipment, Net
description: Total fresh-start adjustment to property and equipment, net.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Receivables, Net
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to receivables.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Restricted Cash and Cash Equivalents, Current
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to current restricted cash and cash equivalents.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Restricted Cash and Cash Equivalents, Noncurrent
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to noncurrent restricted cash and cash equivalents.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Retained Earnings (Deficit)
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to retained earnings or deficit.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Short-term Borrowings
description: Amount of fresh-start adjustment to short-term borrowings.

label: Fresh-Start Adjustment, Increase (Decrease), Stockholders' Equity
description: Total fresh-start adjustment to stockholders' equity.

label: Fuel Costs
description: Fuel costs incurred that are directly related to goods produced and sold and services rendered during the reporting period.

label: Fuel Costs, Gross of Hedging
description: The cost for fuel, incurred during the period, before considering the impacts of any related hedging activities.

label: Funds Held for Clients
description: Carrying amount as of the balance sheet date of the funds held on behalf of others and that are expected to be liquidated within one year or the normal operating cycle, if longer. This does not include funds held under reinsurance agreements.

label: Funds Held under Reinsurance Agreements, Asset
description: Amount of the reinsurer's funds held on its behalf by the ceding insurer, including funds held in trust, under reinsurance treaties or contracts with the assuming insurer as security for the payment of the obligations thereunder.

label: Funds Held under Reinsurance Agreements, Liability
description: Amount of funds held as security for payments to be received under reinsurance contracts.

label: Furniture and Fixtures, Gross
description: Amount before accumulated depreciation of equipment commonly used in offices and stores that have no permanent connection to the structure of a building or utilities. Examples include, but are not limited to, desks, chairs, tables, and bookcases.

label: Future Amortization Expense, after Year Five (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The amount of amortization expense expected to be recognized for the remainder of the finite-lived intangible asset useful life after the fifth succeeding fiscal year.

label: Future Amortization Expense, Remainder of Fiscal Year (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The amount of amortization expense expected to be recognized during the remainder of the current fiscal year.

label: Future Amortization Expense, Year Five (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The amount of amortization expense expected to be recognized during year five of the five succeeding fiscal years.

label: Future Amortization Expense, Year Four (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The amount of amortization expense expected to be recognized during year four of the five succeeding fiscal years.

label: Future Amortization Expense, Year One (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The amount of amortization expense expected to be recognized during year one of the five succeeding fiscal years.

label: Future Amortization Expense, Year Three (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The amount of amortization expense expected to be recognized during year three of the five succeeding fiscal years.

label: Future Amortization Expense, Year Two (Deprecated 2012-01-31)
description: The amount of amortization expense expected to be recognized during year two of the five succeeding fiscal years.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals to be received by the seller-lessee for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, Due in Rolling after Year Five
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee after the fifth rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, Due in Rolling Year Five
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee in the fifth rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, Due in Rolling Year Four
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee in the fourth rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, Due in Rolling Year Three
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee in the third rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, Due in Rolling Year Two
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee in the second rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, Next Rolling Twelve Months
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee in the next rolling twelve months following the latest balance sheet. For interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, Remainder of Fiscal Year
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee in the remainder of the fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, Thereafter
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee after the fifth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, within Five Years
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee in the fifth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, within Four Years
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee in the fourth fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, Next Twelve Months
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee in the next fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, within Three Years
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee in the third fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Minimum Sublease Rentals, Sale Leaseback Transactions, within Two Years
description: Amount of minimum sublease rentals for sale-leaseback transactions accounted for using the deposit method or as a financing to be received by the seller-lessee in the second fiscal year following the latest fiscal year. Excludes interim and annual periods when interim periods are reported on a rolling approach, from latest balance sheet date.

label: Future Net Cash Flows Relating to Proved Oil and Gas Reserves, Cash Inflows
description: Amount of estimated future accumulated cash inflow from the sale of proved oil and gas reserves.

label: Future Net Cash Flows Relating to Proved Oil and Gas Reserves, Development Costs
description: Amount of estimated future accumulated cash outflow for costs to be incurred in developing proved oil and gas reserves.

label: Future Net Cash Flows Relating to Proved Oil and Gas Reserves, Income Tax Expense
description: Amount of estimated future accumulated cash outflow for income tax, based on the future income less future expense derived from production and sale of proved oil and gas reserves.

label: Future Net Cash Flows Relating to Proved Oil and Gas Reserves, Net Cash Flows
description: Amount, after future accumulated cash outflow for development and production costs and future income tax, of estimated future accumulated cash inflow from the sale of proved oil and gas reserves.

label: Future Net Cash Flows Relating to Proved Oil and Gas Reserves, Production Costs
description: Amount of estimated future accumulated cash outflow for costs to be incurred in producing proved oil and gas reserves.

label: Future Net Cash Flows Relating to Proved Oil and Gas Reserves, Ten Percent Annual Discount for Estimated Timing of Cash Flows
description: Amount of discount on future accumulated cash inflow, after deducting future accumulated cash outflow for development and production costs and future income tax, from sale of proved oil and gas reserves, using a discount rate of ten percent a year.

label: Gain Contingency, Patents Allegedly Infringed upon, Number
description: Number of entity's patents that another entity has allegedly infringed.

label: Gain Contingency, Patents Found Infringed upon, Number
description: Number of entity's patents that another entity was found to have infringed.

label: Gain Contingency, Patents Found Not Infringed upon, Number
description: Number of entity's patents that another entity was found not to have infringed.

label: Gain Contingency, Unrecorded Amount
description: The amount or range of possible amounts of gain that could be realized upon the resolution of a contingency.

label: Gain from Components Excluded from Assessment of Cash Flow Hedge Effectiveness
description: The gain relating to components of the gain (loss) on the cash flow hedging instrument excluded from the assessment of cash flow hedge effectiveness. Recognized in earnings.

label: Gain from Components Excluded from Assessment of Fair Value Hedge Effectiveness
description: Gain relating to components of the gain (loss) on the fair value hedging instrument excluded from the assessment of fair value hedge effectiveness. Recognized in earnings.

label: Gain from Hedged Firm Commitment Not Qualifying as Fair Value Hedge
description: Amount of gain recognized in earnings when a hedged firm commitment no longer qualifies as a fair value hedge.

label: Gain (Loss) from Components Excluded from Assessment of Cash Flow Hedge Effectiveness, Net
description: The net gain (loss) relating to components of the gain (loss) on the cash flow hedging instrument excluded from the assessment of cash flow hedge effectiveness. Recognized in earnings.

label: Gain (Loss) from Components Excluded from Assessment of Fair Value Hedge Effectiveness, Net
description: Net gain (loss) relating to components of the gain (loss) on the fair value hedging instrument excluded from the assessment of fair value hedge effectiveness. Recognized in earnings.

label: Gain (Loss) from Hedged Firm Commitment Not Qualifying as Fair Value Hedge, Net
description: Amount of net gain (loss) recognized in earnings when a hedged firm commitment no longer qualifies as a fair value hedge.

label: Gain (Loss) from Hedged Firm Commitment Not Qualifying as Foreign Currency Fair Value Hedge, Net
description: Amount of gain (loss) recognized in earnings for the period when a hedged firm commitment no longer qualifies as an foreign currency fair value hedge.

label: Gain (Loss) from Hedged Firm Commitment Not Qualifying as Interest Rate Fair Value Hedge, Net
description: Amount of gain (loss) recognized in earnings when a hedged firm commitment no longer qualifies as an interest rate fair value hedge.

label: Gain (Loss) from Price Risk Management Activity
description: Gain (loss) incurred in risk management activities.

label: Gain (Loss) on Cash Flow Hedge Ineffectiveness, Net
description: The net gain (loss) recognized in earnings during the reporting period representing the amount of the cash flow hedges' ineffectiveness.

label: Gain (Loss) on Components Excluded from Assessment of Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Effectiveness
description: The net gain (loss) relating to components of the gain (loss) on foreign currency cash flow hedging instruments excluded from the assessment of hedge effectiveness. Recognized in earnings.

label: Gain (Loss) on Components Excluded from Assessment of Interest Rate Cash Flow Hedge Effectiveness
description: The net gain (loss) included in earnings for the period relating to components of the gain (loss) on interest rate cash flow hedging instruments excluded from the assessment of fair value hedge effectiveness.

label: Gain (Loss) on Components Excluded from Assessment of Interest Rate Fair Value Hedge Effectiveness
description: The net gain (loss) included in earnings for the period relating to components of the gain (loss) on interest rate fair value hedging instruments excluded from the assessment of fair value hedge effectiveness.

label: Gain (Loss) on Components Excluded from Assessment of Price Risk Cash Flow Hedge Effectiveness
description: The net gain (loss) relating to components of the gain (loss) on foreign currency cash flow hedging instruments excluded from the assessment of hedge effectiveness. Recognized in earnings.

label: Gain (Loss) on Components Excluded from Assessment of Price Risk Fair Value Hedge Effectiveness
description: The net gain (loss) relating to components of the gain (loss) on price risk fair value hedging instruments excluded from the assessment of fair value hedge effectiveness. Recognized in earnings.

label: Gain (Loss) on Condemnation
description: The gain (loss) is the pre-tax difference between the net condemnation award and the entity's adjusted basis of the condemned property.

label: Gain (Loss) on Contract Termination
description: Gain (loss) related to the termination of a contract between the parties. The termination may be due to many causes including early termination of a lease by a lessee, a breach of contract by one party, or a failure to perform.

label: Gain (Loss) on Credit Risk Derivatives, Net (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
description: The aggregate net gain (loss) from increase (decrease) in fair value of credit risk derivatives included in earnings.

label: Gain (Loss) on Derivative Instruments Held for Trading Purposes, Net
description: Aggregate net gain and losses (whether realized or unrealized) on all derivative instruments held for trading purposes whether or not settled physically.

label: Gain (Loss) on Derivative Instruments, Net, Pretax
description: Aggregate net gain (loss) on all derivative instruments recognized in earnings during the period, before tax effects.

label: Gain (Loss) on Discontinuation of Cash Flow Hedge Due to Forecasted Transaction Probable of Not Occurring, Net
description: The amount of net gain (loss) reclassified into earnings in the period when cash flow hedge is discontinued because it is probable that the original forecasted transactions will not occur by the end of the original period or an additional two month time period.

label: Gain (Loss) on Discontinuation of Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Due to Forecasted Transaction Probable of Not Occurring, Net
description: The amount of net gain (loss) reclassified into earnings when foreign currency cash flow hedge is discontinued because it is probable that the original forecasted transactions will not occur by the end of the original period or an additional two month time period.

label: Gain (Loss) on Discontinuation of Interest Rate Cash Flow Hedge Due to Forecasted Transaction Probable of Not Occurring, Net
description: The amount of net gain (loss) reclassified into earnings when interest rate cash flow hedge is discontinued because it is probable that the original forecasted transactions will not occur by the end of the original period or an additional two month time period.

label: Gain (Loss) on Disposition of Property Plant Equipment, Excluding Oil and Gas Property and Timber Property
description: Amount of gain (loss) on sale or disposal of property, plant and equipment assets, excluding oil and gas property and timber property.

label: Gain (Loss) on Disposition of Assets
description: Amount of gain (loss) on sale or disposal of assets, including but not limited to property plant and equipment, intangible assets and equity in securities of subsidiaries or equity method investee.

label: Gain (Loss) on Disposition of Intangible Assets
description: Amount of gain (loss) on sale or disposal of intangible assets.

label: Gain (Loss) on Disposition of Other Assets (Deprecated 2011-01-31)
description: The gains and losses included in results of operations resulting from the sale or disposal of other assets not otherwise defined.

label: Gain (Loss) on Disposition of Other Financial Assets
description: Amount of gain (loss) on disposal of other assets utilized in financial service operations.

label: Gain (Loss) on Disposition of Property (Deprecated 2013-01-31)
description: The gains (losses) included in results of operations resulting from the sale or disposal of property, plant and equipment, which do not qualify for treatment as discontinued operations. This item does not include any gain (loss) recognized on the sale of oil and gas property or timber property.

label: Gain (Loss) on Disposition of Real Estate, Discontinued Operations
description: Amount of difference between the carrying amount and the sales price of real estate properties sold as part of discontinued operations.

label: Gain (Loss) on Fair Value Hedge Ineffectiveness, Net
description: Amount of gain (loss)recognized in the income statement from the hedging ineffectiveness of a fair value hedge.

label: Gain (Loss) on Fair Value Hedges Recognized in Earnings
description: Total amount of gain (loss) derived from fair value hedges recognized in earnings in the period.

label: Gain (Loss) on Foreign Currency Cash Flow Hedge Ineffectiveness
description: The net gain (loss) during the reporting period due to ineffectiveness in foreign currency cash flow hedges. Recognized in earnings.

label: Gain (Loss) on Foreign Currency Derivative Instruments Not Designated as Hedging Instruments
description: Amount of gain (loss) recognized in earnings in the period from the increase (decrease) in fair value of foreign currency derivatives not designated as hedging instruments.

label: Gain (Loss) on Foreign Currency Derivatives Recorded in Earnings, Net
description: Aggregate impact of foreign currency derivatives on earnings for the period. Includes impact of foreign currency cash flow hedge ineffectiveness and the ineffectiveness of fair value hedging derivatives and full change in fair value of the foreign currency derivatives not designated as hedging instruments.

label: Gain (Loss) on Foreign Currency Fair Value Hedge Derivatives
description: Amount of gain (loss) from the increase (decrease) in fair value of foreign currency derivatives and nonderivative instruments designated as fair value hedging instruments which were recognized in earnings, net of offsets by the gain (loss) on the hedged item to the extent that the fair value hedge was determined to be effective.

label: Gain (Loss) on Foreign Currency Fair Value Hedge Ineffectiveness
description: The net gain (loss) recognized in earnings during the period due to the ineffectiveness on foreign currency fair value hedges.

label: Gain (Loss) on Interest Rate Cash Flow Hedge Ineffectiveness
description: The net gain (loss) during the reporting period due to ineffectiveness in interest rate cash flow hedges. Recognized in earnings.

label: Gain (Loss) on Interest Rate Derivative Instruments Not Designated as Hedging Instruments
description: Amount of gain (loss) included in earnings for the period from the increase (decrease) in fair value of interest rate derivatives not designated as hedging instruments.

label: Gain (Loss) on Interest Rate Fair Value Hedge Ineffectiveness
description: The net gain (loss) recognized in earnings during the period due to the ineffectiveness on interest rate fair value hedges.

label: Gain (Loss) on Investments
description: Amount of realized and unrealized gain (loss) on investment.

label: Gain (Loss) on Investments, Excluding Other than Temporary Impairments
description: This item represents the net total realized and unrealized gain (loss) included in earnings for the period as a result of selling or holding marketable securities categorized as trading, available-for-sale, or held-to-maturity, including the unrealized holding gain (loss) of held-to-maturity securities transferred to the trading security category and the cumulative unrealized gain (loss) which was included in other comprehensive income (a separate component of shareholders' equity) for available-for-sale securities transferred to trading securities during the period. Additionally, this item would include any gains (losses) realized during the period from the sale of investments accounted for under the cost method of accounting.

label: Gain (Loss) on Non-Recourse Debt
description: Amount represents the difference between the cash acquisition price of the debt and the net carrying amount of the debt at the time of its extinguishment (or deconsolidation of in-substance real estate when an entity defaults on its debt obligations).

label: Gain (Loss) on Hedging Activity
description: Gain (loss) incurred in hedging activities.
